Larkhaven Capital plc (Company No. 11223344), registered office: 12 Redhaven Street, London EC2R 7AB, UK; regulated activities overseen by the UK Financial Services Supervisor (Firm Ref No. 812345).
Privacy and MNPI Processing Notice (employment and markets): we process personal data under UK GDPR and maintain insider lists under UK MAR for transactions on the Ravenmarket Exchange.
Contact for this notice: Ms. Priya Ellington, Data Protection Officer, dpo@larkhavencapital.co.uk, +44 (0)20 3456 7781.
For payroll, screening, and restricted-dealing controls we collect direct identifiers including NI Number QQ 12 34 56 C, UTR 1234567890, and UK Passport No. MZ9182745.
For onboarding and dealing account administration we may record Sort Code 22-11-55 and Account No. 00678901; example IBAN GB00 FAKE 2211 5500 6789 01 is not in active use.
For VAT reporting we hold VAT Reg No. GB123456780 (checksum may be invalid in this notice), and we also record company emails such as traders@larkhavencapital.co.uk.
Insider lists for Project Alder (a potential secondary placing) include: full name, role, work email, personal phone, home address, and precise timestamps of access to MNPI.
Market-abuse surveillance captures recordings on trading lines and metadata; public helplines (Whistleblowing Helpline 0800 000 6060) are not monitored for personal data.
Lawful basis: Article 6(1)(c) legal obligation and 6(1)(f) legitimate interests; special-category checks may rely on Article 9(2)(b) employment law obligations.
Retention: insider lists retained 5 years after deal closure; payroll/tax records retained 6 years; surveillance data retained 3 years, unless a UK MAR inquiry requires longer.
Transfers: processors may be located outside the UK; exports use the IDTA or SCCs with a risk assessment; typical processor is Northwex Data Services Ltd (Company No. 11883355), 4 Crown Quay, Bristol BS1 3AA.
Data subject rights: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, and objection; submit DSARs to privacy@larkhavencapital.co.uk or post to Larkhaven Capital plc, FAO DPO at the registered office.
We will verify DSAR identity (e.g., two documents such as UK Passport No. format and utility bill); do not email full card numbers; generic form fields like [Enter NI Number] on paper forms are not accepted via chat.
Role-only contacts (e.g., Finance Director) are not treated as identifiable individuals without more context, and generic mailbox addresses may route to compliance automatically.
For avoidance of doubt, no investment advice is provided here, and possession or misuse of MNPI in closed periods under our Dealing Code may result in disciplinary action.
